title: Methods of reducing friction on a surface of an apparatus that stores or transports a gas
abstract: The present invention provides methods of reducing friction on a surface of an apparatus that stores or transports a gas, comprising: (a) contacting the surface either directly or through an intermediate organometallic layer with a fluorinated material in a diluent, wherein the fluorinated material has the following structure:
claims: 1. A method of reducing friction on a metal surface of an apparatus that stores or transports a gas, the method comprising: (a) contacting the surface either directly or through an intermediate organometallic layer with a fluorinated material in a diluent, wherein the fluorinated material has the following structure:
